SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADILLA, NANCY MCEVORY, COLLEEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 765 O'FARRELL ST #46 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94109, STAYED UNTIL OCT-07-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE BUT EVICTION SHALL NOT TAKE P PLACE UNTIL OCT 9, 1996. ALL RENTS ARE WAIVED. IF DEFTS VACATE BEFORE OCT 7, 1996, EVICTION SHALL BE CANCELLED, JUDGMENT VACATED AND ACTION DISMISSED EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY'S FEES. SEE FILE FOR FURTHER JUDGMENT
